overall.description: A cinematic aerial shot from Cyberpunk 2077 showing Night City's downtown at night. The camera slowly drifts forward above a busy multi-lane intersection, surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers with neon lighting and a massive arch megastructure visible in the foggy distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated aerial view of futuristic downtown intersection

events.description: camera begins slow forward drift from initial static hover position

agents.ego_description: piloting an aerial vehicle or drone slowly forward above the city streets, observing the traffic flow below

entered.detail: tall modern skyscraper with illuminated yellow window lights dominating the right side of frame
massive arch-shaped megabuilding structure visible through the fog in the distance
raised highway or monorail track visible on the left side with vehicle lights
multi-lane street intersection with moving vehicle headlights and taillights visible below
illuminated digital screen visible in the upper left corner of the frame

segments.scene_description: Opening aerial view of a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. The camera hovers high above a busy intersection surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers with warm yellow lighting, then begins a slow forward drift. A massive arch megastructure looms in the foggy distance while moderate traffic flows on the streets below.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching central megastructure with dense urban canyon

events.description: camera trajectory shifts slightly rightward, revealing more of the right-side building facade

agents.ego_description: continuing the slow aerial approach toward the central arch structure while maintaining steady altitude above the traffic

entered.detail: tall thin tower with bright white lighting becoming visible behind the arch structure
lower building with bright neon signage entering view on the right as the skyscraper recedes

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues drifting forward, the right-side skyscraper gradually recedes into the mid-ground while the massive central arch megastructure grows larger and more detailed. A new illuminated spire becomes visible in the far distance, and the perspective shifts slightly rightward revealing additional neon-lit buildings. The street traffic continues flowing below through the foggy atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial drift through a futuristic cityscape at night, moving from a high vantage point over a busy intersection toward a looming megastructure. It begins hovering above a multi-lane street surrounded by glass skyscrapers with warm yellow lighting, while a massive arch looms in the foggy distance. As the camera glides forward, the skyscraper on the right recedes into the mid-ground, allowing the central arch to grow larger and more detailed in the frame. The perspective then shifts slightly rightward to reveal additional neon-lit buildings and a distant illuminated spire emerging through the haze. Finally, the camera continues its steady advance over the flowing traffic below, deepening the sense of scale within the foggy urban expanse.
